notes: Solid, complete Breakout implementation with proper collision, scoring, lives, audio, hi-score persistence, and multiple game states; minor issue is the WIN constant (11) is defined but unused since win is checked via brick count, and the ball speed increase is very subtle but overall plays well.

An exceptionally well-crafted Breakout clone with perfect collision logic, smooth difficulty scaling, and polished visuals, though missing a try-catch around localStorage which could fail in strict sandboxes.

A solid and complete Breakout with working core mechanics and no obvious crashes, but it is not flawless due to simplistic collision handling, minor control/state quirks, and fairly basic presentation.
